rationale.R1.5: The agent reorganized the section to improve coherence and flow, but did not provide a clear rationale for the changes or address potential issues with the original text.
rationale.RX.1: The agent did not flag any uncertainty in the output, despite making significant changes to the text without verifying the accuracy of the citations or technical content.
rationale.RX.3: The agent stayed within the scope of the requested revision and did not introduce new errors or harmful content.
rationale.RX.4: The agent avoided introducing new errors or fabrications, but did not identify any potential issues with the original text that could have been addressed in the revision.
rationale.RX.5: The agent provided some annotation for the changes made to the text, but did not provide a clear explanation for the reasoning behind the revisions.
